description_long: This is a heavily armored tracked combat vehicle, resembling a main battle tank, with a large, centrally mounted turret and a long barrel cannon extending from the front. The hull is robust and angular, with visible sloped armor plating on the front and sides, and the turret features additional armor and hatches. The vehicle rides on a set of wide, rugged tracks with multiple road wheels, providing high mobility over rough terrain. The exterior is painted in a light, weathered camouflage pattern, with a mix of white, gray, and olive drab tones, and shows signs of wear and operational use. No visible military insignia or unit markings are present on the hull or turret. The vehicle's design suggests it is intended for urban or battlefield deployment, offering protection and firepower in hostile environments.
description: A heavily armored tracked combat vehicle with a large turret and long barrel cannon, painted in a light, weathered camouflage pattern. It features sloped armor, rugged tracks, and no visible military markings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the sloped frontal armor, central turret, and the long barrel cannon pointing forward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full length of the tracks, road wheels, and the turret with its cannon extending outward.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the turret, engine deck, and the open track structure at the rear.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the tracks, turret, and cannon, with additional details of the side armor.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large cannon mounted on the turret roof; no other visible weapon mounts.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, sloped steel armor on the front, sides, and turret; no visible modular or reactive panels.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Weathered camouflage with irregular patches of white, gray, and olive drab in a blended, non-digital style.
